top_signals.title: Trump says rising economic costs will not force him into Iran deal
top_signals.summary: President’s comments come as hopes of an agreement to end the war push oil prices lower
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BlackRock's Rosenberg on Fed Rates, IALT ETF Strategy
top_signals.summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the iShares Systematic Alternatives Active ETF (IALT) at BlackRock, explains how the ETF is navigating the current economic environment on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The world comes to Xi
top_signals.summary: Foreign officials have flocked to China’s leader this year, boosting Beijing’s efforts to portray itself as a pillar of stability
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
top_signals.summary: Accredited investors can buy and sell the gold-backed GLDY token through permissioned liquidity pools operating on the Solana blockchain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: PACs laud Texas primary wins, look to back more pro-crypto candidates
top_signals.summary: While crypto industry-backed candidates won runoffs in Texas on Tuesday, industry PACs have less of a stake in California races next week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Starmer prepares child social media curbs as pressure mounts on addictive apps
top_signals.summary: The government is preparing to tighten restrictions on children’s social media use after a consultation that drew more than 81,000 responses, with ministers expected to target the design of major platforms rather than impose a blanket ban for under-16s. New measures under consideration include restrictions on autoplay videos, infinite scrolling, push notifications, overnight access and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
